statement: The function api_rate_guard has a parameter named window with a default value of 60.
The function api_rate_guard has a parameter named limit with a default value of 100.
The function api_rate_guard returns a tuple.
If the length of recent is greater than the limit, the function returns False and 0.
If the length of recent is less than or equal to the limit, the function returns True and the difference between the limit and the length of recent.
The function api_rate_guard includes a list comprehension loop.
